name: AWS Certified Data Engineer – Associate (DEA-C01)
description: Associate-level certification for data engineers who implement and manage data pipelines on AWS. Validates ability to ingest, transform, and orchestrate data solutions. 1+ years hands-on experience with data engineering. 65 questions, 130 minutes.
exportIntroQuestions:
## About this document

This document is a collection of practice exam questions for the **AWS Certified Data Engineer – Associate (DEA-C01)** certification. The questions were selected because they represent realistic data engineering scenarios commonly encountered when building and managing data pipelines on AWS.

### Certification context

This certification validates the ability to implement and manage data pipelines and data stores on AWS, including topics such as:

* Designing data ingestion solutions (Kinesis, Glue, DMS, MSK)
* Implementing data transformation and ETL workflows
* Managing data stores (S3, RDS, DynamoDB, Redshift, OpenSearch)
* Automating and monitoring data pipelines
* Implementing data security, governance, and compliance controls

### About the questions

Each question in this document is independent and should be analyzed as a standalone scenario. Practice exams intentionally present isolated situations, and questions may appear in any order during the actual certification exam. Information from one question should never be assumed to apply to another.

For each scenario, this document includes:

* The original practice exam question.
* An explanation of the data engineering reasoning behind the correct answer.
* A discussion of why the remaining options are less appropriate for the stated requirements.

### Learning objective

The primary goal of this material is to develop data engineering reasoning rather than memorization. The focus should be on understanding the data requirements and constraints presented in each scenario, identifying the AWS data services and pipeline patterns that best satisfy those requirements, and recognizing the trade-offs between performance, cost, and complexity.

By studying the decision-making process behind each answer, readers can build the data engineering skills expected for the AWS certification exam.
exportIntroTranscripts:
## About this document

This document contains technical summaries of lesson transcripts related to the **AWS Certified Data Engineer – Associate (DEA-C01)** certification.

### Purpose
Organizes and synthesizes lesson content in a structured format for quick review and deeper understanding of the concepts presented.
exportIntroChat:
## About this document

This document contains AI study conversations related to the **AWS Certified Data Engineer – Associate (DEA-C01)** certification.

### Purpose
Records discussions and explanations generated during interactive AI study sessions, serving as complementary reference material.

domains.name: Data Ingestion and Transformation
domains.description: Domain 1 (34%): Choose appropriate data ingestion services (Kinesis, Glue, DMS). Design and implement data transformation solutions. Orchestrate data pipelines.

domains.name: Data Store Management
domains.description: Domain 2 (26%): Design data stores (S3, RDS, DynamoDB, Redshift). Manage data lifecycle, implement data catalog and schema management.

domains.name: Data Operations and Support
domains.description: Domain 3 (22%): Automate data processing, manage and monitor data pipelines, ensure data quality.

domains.name: Data Security and Governance
domains.description: Domain 4 (18%): Apply authentication and authorization mechanisms, implement data encryption, ensure data governance and compliance.
